nasb.text: I have sunk in deep mire, and there is no foothold; I have come into deep waters, and a flood overflows me.

esv.text: I sink in deep mire, where there is no foothold; I have come into deep waters, and the flood sweeps over me.

cnv.text: 我深陷在淤泥中， 沒有立足之地； 我到了水深之處， 波濤漫過我身。

ccb.text: 我深陷泥沼，无法站稳脚； 我落入深渊，被洪流淹没。

csbs.text: 我陷入深深的沼泽中，没有立足之地； 我进入众水的深处，洪流漫过我身。
